case_title: LERIO BERNABE VS. PETER CHAN et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-19-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNABE,LERIO
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OFF CALENDAR. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-06-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-22-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNABE,LERIO AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, PETER KRIEKENBEEK, DENZIL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-22-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-21-2001 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-22-2002
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: TISHGART, KENNETH B. SUBSTITUTED FOR CAHILL, JOHN MICHAEL AS ATTORNEY FOR BERNABE,LERIO
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-19-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO COMPLAINT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-06-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
